bibliographic_resolution.evidence: Every handbook content page footer identifies NPS Museum Handbook, Part I (2002). Later PDF creation, modification and server dates describe file production or hosting, not the handbook publication year.

rights.rights_basis: Official NPS-hosted work with National Park Service, U.S. Department of the Interior corporate authorship; U.S. federal works are not subject to domestic copyright under 17 U.S.C. 105.
rights.component_policy: Exclude every numbered figure, photograph, permission-reproduced or courtesy component, commercial reference, external source block and item with uncertain authorship.

audit.text_review: all 50 physical pages manually screened; physical pages 6-17 read at claim level
audit.visual_review: all 50 rendered pages manually inspected in ordered contact sheets
